news.headline: US and UAE report Iran attacks as military pushes to reopen Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: US forces opened a passage through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after sinking Iranian boats and escorting merchant ships, as fresh attacks struck vessels and facilities in the United Arab Emirates. news.headline: ‘Extensive brutality’: Rebel attacks reap hell on Congolese civilians
news.summary: ISIL-linked group has tortured, killed and abducted civilians in the Democratic Republic of Congo, including children.
